title: Random Events Mod
description: This Mod Makes Random Events Happen While your playing minecraft, they could be good or bad
body:
This mod makes every 60 seconds a random event happens this could be a bad event or a good one, you can change it from 60 seconds using the new gamerule "TicksBetweenEvents", 1 second = 20 ticks hope you have fun

Some Events:
1. Lava Below you
2. Gives you Iron
3. Gives you Diamond
4. Gives you a Dirt Sword
5. Gives you "The Sword"
6. Spawns a Zombie
7. Spawns 3 Spiders
8. Spawns 3 Spiders
9. Spawns a Skeleton

These are just a couple but theres a lot more
